subcodes.first_line: O tyrannical wolf! Thou and thy son have regarded, and still regard, the Hand of God as fettered. Say: O ye sources of tyranny and wickedness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذئب ظالم و ابنش ید الله را مغلول دانسته و میدانند قل یا مطالع البغی و الفحشاء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @methods of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
